title: sida quettensis
intro: Sida quettensis, also known as Quetta mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and discomfort, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Sida quettensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
